title: Frog Tape Orange Gloss & Satin Painters Masking Tape 24mm x 41.1m, Indoor Painting and Decorating For Sharp Lines and No Paint Bleed
features: Keeps paint out, keeps lines sharp
For use with gloss and satin paints (waterbased)
The only masking tape treated with PaintBlock technology
As with all quality masking tapes, please test on a small area before and remove soon after painting
description: From the manufacturer Inspiration With FrogTape you can create bespoke designs that are unique to you. Get creative in your home and garden too! Stripes Sheds Furniture Geometrics FrogTape Painter's Masking Tapes All FrogTape painter’s tapes are treated with patented PaintBlock Technology, a super-absorbent polymer that reacts with the water in emulsion paint and instantly gels to form a micro-barrier. It seals the edges of the tape, preventing paint bleed and the need for touch-ups. The results are crisp, clean paint lines each time. The signature recyclable and reusable FrogTape canister protects your tape edge not only against moisture, but nicks and dents that can ruin the tape edge during storage. The FrogTape Brand Difference Prevents Paint Bleed Made with exclusive PaintBlock Technology, a super-absorbent polymer that reacts with the water in emulsion paint and instantly gels to form a micro-barrier that seals the edges of the tape to prevent paint bleed. Professional Paint Lines FrogTape painter's tape delivers professional results. New to painting? Go with the wider width, 36mm to provide more protection for your surface. Premium Tape Canister The FrogTape tape canister helps to keep the tape clean and protected while in storage, so the second paint project looks just as professional as the first. MULTI- SURFACE GLOSS & SATIN DELICATE SURFACE Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 28,256 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,602 4.5 out of 5 stars 15,083 Price £4.76 £ 4 . 76 £5.69 £ 5 . 69 £5.40 £ 5 . 40 Contains Paintblock Technology to Prevent Paint Bleed ✓ ✓ ✓ Clean Removal Time 21 days 21 days 60 days Clean Removal Time (Direct Sunlight) 7 days 7 days 60 days Applications Cured Painted Surfaces, Wood Trim, Glass & Metal Cured Painted Surfaces, Glass, Carpet & Stone Freshly Painted Surfaces & Coated Wallpaper Adhesive Strength Medium Medium Low Backing Smooth Crepe Paper Crepe Paper Washi Paper Tips To Achieve The Sharpest Paint Lines Clean Surface & Let Dry Sand then clean the area you will be masking and painting before you tape to make sure the surface is dust free. Use a damp sponge and a few drops of washing up liquid mixed in a bucket of warm water. Let surface dry completely before applying tape. Tape in 30-60cm Sections Tape any areas on your surface you want to keep paint-free. For best results, tape in 30-60cm sections to avoid stretching the tape. Burnish Tape's Edge Burnish the tape’s edge with a plastic tool like a putty knife or credit card to ensure the tape is completely flush with the surface you will be painting. Remove Tape When Paint is Wet For best results, remove the tape while the paint is still wet, making sure to slowly pull at a 45 degree angle.
